name: @hippo/assetworks-exchange
description: Assetworks Exchange — the host front end Hippo parasites onto. Built on AssetWorks' own FE stack (Next.js 15, Tailwind v4 aw-* tokens, shadcn, Zustand, ECharts) so it stays portable with the assetwork-ai-web product. Imports ZERO Hippo packages — the only links to Hippo are the host-venue HTTP wire and the /loader.js embed.
